description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content updated (published: July 13, 2026)

Hanno City is selling premium digital gift vouchers. Using national subsidy funds, these are digital vouchers that can be used at PayPay-affiliated shops in the city.

【Sale Details】
Vouchers worth ¥7,500 are sold for ¥5,000. You can apply for up to 15 vouchers per person. 72,000 vouchers are planned for sale. If there are many applicants, the number allocated may be reduced by lottery.

【Eligibility】
Residents of Hanno City aged 12 and older. You must complete identity verification in the PayPay app.

【Application Period】
July 1–31, 2026 (Reiwa 8). Apply through the PayPay app.

【Sale Period】
August 3–31, 2026 (Reiwa 8).

【Usage Period】
From purchase date through December 25, 2026.

【Eligible Stores】
PayPay-affiliated shops in the city that are designated by Hanno City. The list of eligible stores will be available in the PayPay app as of July 1, 2026.

【How to Use PayPay – Operation Workshops (no advance reservation required)】
For people who are unsure about using the PayPay app, identity verification, or the application process.

Before applications open: June 18, 24, 26, 29 — each day 10:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.
After applications open: July 14, 15, 16, 22 — each day 10:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.

Venues include the Citizen Activities Center, Higashigoyano/Haraichiba District Government Center, and the City Hall Annex. Bring your smartphone and one form of ID (My Number Card, driver's license, etc.).

【Contact】
PayPay Customer Support
Phone: 0120-990-634 (24 hours, 365 days)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/sangyoshinkoka/13410.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City is selling premium digital gift vouchers
